# Discord Server Setup Guide

## Server Structure

When creating the Elmoorx Discord server, use this channel structure:

### 📋 Categories & Channels

#### ℹ️ INFORMATION
- `#welcome` — welcome message + rules
- `#announcements` — official announcements (read-only)
- `#changelog` — auto-posted from GitHub releases
- `#roadmap` — what's coming next

#### 💬 GENERAL
- `#general` — general chat
- `#introductions` — introduce yourself
- `#showcase` — share what you built
- `#off-topic` — non-Elmoorx chat

#### 🆘 HELP
- `#help` — ask for help
- `#runtime` — runtime questions (signals, store, islands)
- `#router` — routing questions
- `#server` — server/middleware questions
- `#ui` — UI component questions
- `#auth` — authentication questions

#### 🛠️ DEVELOPMENT
- `#contributing` — contributing discussion
- `#bugs` — bug reports (link to GitHub Issues)
- `#feature-requests` — feature ideas
- `#pr-reviews` — PR review requests

#### 📦 PACKAGES
- `#packages-general` — package-specific questions
- `#postgres` — @elmoorx/postgres
- `#i18n` — @elmoorx/i18n
- `#web3` — @elmoorx/web3
- `#ar-vr` — @elmoorx/ar-vr

#### 🌍 COMMUNITY
- `#events` — meetups, livestreams
- `#jobs` — job postings (Elmoorx-related)
- `#resources` — tutorials, articles, videos

### 🤖 Bots to Add

1. **GitHub Bot** — posts PR/issue notifications
2. **npm Bot** — posts when new versions are published
3. **MEE6** — auto-roles, welcome messages
4. **Dyno** — moderation

### 📝 Welcome Message

```
# ⚡ Welcome to the Elmoorx Discord!

Elmoorx is a next-generation full-stack framework — zero-hydration islands, reactive store, auto-security, edge-ready runtime.

## 📌 Quick Links
- 📖 Documentation: https://elmoorx.dev/docs
- 🐛 Report bugs: https://github.com/elmoorx0/elmoorx0/issues
- 💬 Discussions: https://github.com/elmoorx0/elmoorx0/discussions
- 📦 npm: https://www.npmjs.com/org/elmoorx

## 📋 Rules
1. Be respectful and inclusive
2. No spam or self-promotion (unless in #showcase)
3. Use the right channel for your question
4. Search before asking — your question may already be answered
5. Use English in main channels (regional channels may be added)

## 🎭 Roles
- `@Elmoorx Team` — framework maintainers
- `@Contributor` — has contributed to the repo
- `@Helper` — actively helps others
- `@Member` — default role

## 🆘 Need help?
1. Check #welcome and pinned messages
2. Search the channel
3. Ask in the appropriate #help channel
4. Be patient — helpers are volunteers

Happy building! ⚡
```

### 🎨 Server Settings

- **Server Name**: Elmoorx
- **Server Icon**: ⚡ (lightning bolt)
- **Verify Level**: Medium (must be registered for 5+ minutes)
- **Explicit Content Filter**: All members
- **Default Notifications**: Only @mentions
